membership_no.text: คีย์ทะเบียนเต็ม

name.text: ชื่อ - สกุล

line_no.text: พิมพ์บรรทัดที่

combo.member_name: select (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as item_code ,(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as item_desc from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = {0}

root.sql: select sc_mem_print_book_item.membership_no ,sc_mem_print_book_item.seq_no ,sc_mem_print_book_item.line_no ,sc_mem_print_book_item.operate_date ,sc_mem_print_book_item.share_stock ,sc_mem_print_book_item.norm_balance ,sc_mem_print_book_item.spec_balance ,sc_mem_print_book_item.emer_balance ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_print_book_item.operate_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_tdate from sc_mem_print_book_item where 1 = 1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_print_book_item.membership_no = '010620'
